chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 2841 of 2022 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.12563/2022. 2. For hearing of main case. 18.03.2025 Mr. Sattar Silat, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Kashif Nazeer, Assistant Attorney General. Per learned counsel notice has been impugned herein, which in his opinion is unwarranted in view of Judgment reported as 2023 PTD 576 (Wazir Ali Industries Ltd. vs. Federation of Pakistan & Others). Be that as it may, notice has been issued herein and the counsel states that the same shall be contested before the issuing authority. Learned counsel seeks for notice to be adjudicated vide a speaking order after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner and pending aforesaid, no coercive action be taken there against. Learned Assistant Attorney General articulates no cavil to the aforesaid and states that petition be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
